pageContent: This is the default content in English.
nq_dynamic_sub: Update content in real time, without changing your code
nq_web_desc: Redirect anyone who scans to any URL — product pages, landing pages, or online stores. You can update the destination link anytime without reprinting.
nq_pdf_desc: Share a PDF document instantly — menus, brochures, catalogs, or manuals. No app needed on the scanner's side, just a browser.
nq_images_desc: Display a photo gallery when scanned. Great for portfolios, event photos, product shots, or real estate listings.
nq_ecard_desc: A digital business card — share your name, job title, phone, email, and social links. Scanners can save your contact directly to their phone.
nq_video_desc: Play a video directly on scan — product demos, tutorials, testimonials, or promo clips. No login or app required for the viewer.
nq_links_desc: Bundle multiple links into a single clean page — like a mini link-in-bio. Perfect for creators, teams, or campaigns with many destinations.
nq_sosmed_desc: Show all your social media profiles in one place. One scan gets visitors to your Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and more — all at once.
nq_allinone_desc: Combine text, links, images, video, and contact info into one rich landing page. The most flexible option for telling your full story.
nq_special_desc: Build a fully custom HTML page from scratch. Total creative freedom — ideal for unique promotions, interactive content, or branded experiences.
mq_no_category: No QR cards in this category.
mq_del_desc: This will permanently delete the QR card and all its uploaded assets from storage.
mq_del_warn: Once deleted, it cannot be restored.
mq_trial: You are using QRkartu's free trial.

st_no_sub: You don't have an active subscription. Some features may be limited.

tp_step2: Mark where the QR code should appear
tp_canvas_hint: Click and drag on the image to mark the QR area. Drag again to reposition.
tp_area_small: Selection too small — drag a larger area.
tp_area_ok: QR area selected. Drag again to reposition.
tp_alert_no_area: Please mark the QR area on the image before saving.
sg_subtitle: Manage your files stored in the cloud. To free up space, edit the QR card and remove files from it.
sg_stored_across: stored across all your QR cards
sg_no_files: No files stored yet. Upload images, videos, or PDFs through your QR cards.
sg_garbage_no_unused: No unused files found. Your storage is clean.
sg_garbage_all_used: All files are in use — nothing to clean up.
sg_garbage_cannot_check: Could not check for unused files.
sg_del_unused_body: These files are no longer used by any QR card and can be safely removed.
sg_permanent: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
sg_delete_error: Could not delete. Please try again.
pl_subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs. Plans accumulate — buying the same plan twice doubles your quota.
pl_accumulate_note: Plans are accumulative — each purchase adds on top of your existing quota with its own expiry date. For example, buying Single twice gives you 2 QR cards and 60 MB across two separate billing periods.
pl_cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this pending payment?
pl_no_subs: No subscriptions yet. Choose a plan above to get started.
nc_name_help: Only letters and numbers allowed. No spaces or special characters.

nc_autofill_sub_ecard: Auto-fills appearance, contact info, and phone/email/website
nc_autofill_sub_sosmed: Auto-fills appearance, basic info, and social media items
nc_autofill_sub_links: Auto-fills appearance, basic info, and link items

nc_s_images_sub: Upload and manage your gallery images.
nc_s_plaintext_sub: This text will be encoded directly into the QR code.
nc_s_website_url_sub: This URL will be encoded directly into the QR code.
nc_s_email_sub: Recipient address, subject, and pre-filled body.
nc_s_whatsapp_sub: Phone number and pre-filled message for the recipient.
nc_stats_schedule_activate: Activate the schedule to work during certain dates
nc_stats_url_config_warn: Be careful when changing this URL. Updating it will also change the destination of this QR.
nc_stats_short_help: Letters, numbers, '-' and '_' only, no spaces or other symbols (2–32 characters).
nc_info_text: Scanning the QR code shows this text directly — no redirect involved.
nc_info_web_static: Scanning the QR code opens this URL directly — no redirect involved.
nc_info_email: When scanned, the email app opens with this address, subject, and message ready to send.
nc_info_wa_message: When scanned, WhatsApp opens with this message ready to send.
nc_disc_web_static: Scanning will open this URL directly
nc_disc_email: Scanning opens the email app with this pre-filled draft
nc_disc_wa: Scanning opens WhatsApp with this number & message
nc_disc_vcard: Scanning saves this contact to the phone
nc_img_drop_hint: Click or drag & drop images here

nd_s_frame_sub: Define the QR card outline by choosing from preset frames.

hero_title: QR card Generator: Create your free QR card
hero_desc: Create vCards, websites, texts, and much more. Customize, track, and boost your marketing with QRkartu.
qr_auto_generate: Your QR card will be generated automatically after you enter the details.
cta_no_credit_card: ✔️ No credit card required   ✔️ Track dynamic codes
how_title: How to create a QR card?
how_desc: Follow these quick steps to generate, customize and export.
how_step1_desc: Select the type of data you want to embed. From Website URLs to detailed vCards.
how_step2_desc: Enhance your QR card with vibrant colors, a central logo, and appealing frames.
how_step3_desc: Export in vectors (SVG/EPS) or PNG/JPG formats ready for any high-quality print.
types_title: Generate different types of QR Codes
feat_dynamic_desc: Update the destination link of your QR card at any time, without having to reprint it. Perfect for menus, portfolios, and evolving campaigns.
feat_vector_desc: Download in SVG, PDF, and EPS for infinite scalability. Guarantee perfect scannability on billboards and business cards alike.
bento_c1_desc: Take full control of the appearance. Choose precise hex colors, modify patterns, and seamlessly integrate your brand's unique logo right in the center.
bento_c2_desc: Monitor scans with precision. View analytics by location, device types, operating systems, and timestamps.
bento_c3_desc: Generate hundreds of unique QR codes instantly via CSV data upload or through our comprehensive API.
bento_c4_desc: Fix a typo or change a campaign target on the fly. Dynamic QR codes adapt immediately without needing re-printing.
strat_title: Create your own QR codes to boost your marketing strategy.
strat_c1_desc: Allow clients to save your exact contact info instantly directly to their address book.
strat_c2_desc: Turn static street marketing into trackable interactive digital experiences in seconds.
strat_c3_desc: Provide manuals, warranty info, or authenticity verification straight on the box.
brand_title: Deliver your own professional QR codes
tech_title: Everything you need to know to get started
faq_q1: What exactly is a dynamic QR card?
faq_q2: How does pricing and the plans work?
faq_q3: Are the generated QR codes for commercial use?
faq_q4: What if my printed code gets damaged?
faq_q5: Can I design a custom QR with my logo?
foot_try: Try our QR card generator for 7 days free.
faq_a1: A dynamic QR card allows you to change the destination URL or content at any time without having to reprint the physical QR code itself. This provides flexibility for evolving campaigns.
faq_a2: Plans are accumulative — each purchase adds on top of your existing quota with its own expiry date. For example, buying a plan twice doubles your active quota across those respective billing periods.
faq_a3: Yes, all QR codes generated on our platform, regardless of your plan, are fully cleared for personal and commercial use without any restrictions.
faq_a4: Our QR codes have up to 30% error correction, meaning they will likely still scan even if partially damaged. However, we highly recommend reprinting if essential elements are unreadable.
faq_a5: Absolutely! You can add custom colors, choose unique patterns, and insert your brand's unique logo right in the center for a highly personalized look.

pricing_sub: Flexible plans. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
plan_single_desc: Perfect for individuals and small projects.
plan_team_desc: Ideal for small businesses and agencies.
plan_corp_desc: Advanced features for large scale operations.
